access_token.description: Pre-issued Salesforce OAuth access token; sent as a Bearer token. Never logged. Token acquisition/refresh is intentionally outside this connector.

business_unit_id.description: Pardot Business Unit Id, sent as the Pardot-Business-Unit-Id header on every request.

base_url.description: Pardot API base URL override for tests, sandboxes, or proxies.

id.description: Record id used by detail streams.
